---
name: Skill submission
about: Submit a new SKILL.md for review
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: skill
assignees: ''

---

**Skill name**
Provide the skill name as it appears in the SKILL.md frontmatter.

**Short description**
One-line summary of what the skill does.

**Files included**
- `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`
- templates (if any): `LLMWiki/templates/...`
- example-output (if any): `skills/<skill-name>/example-output/`

**Validation steps**
How a reviewer can run or validate the skill (Claude Cowork upload or local runner steps).

**License & attribution**
Confirm any third-party assets and licensing/attribution notes.
